LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF THOMAS MURRAY JOINDER OF KATHLEEN A. MCLORGS' MOTION TO DETERMINE ARBITRABILITY (ON REMAND FROM THE CALIFORNIA COURT OF APPEAL) IN KATHLEEN A. MCLORG V. UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION, SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT #458338. HEARING HELD, ARGUED, AND THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: SEVERANCE DENIED. THIS MATTER IS NOT SUBJECT TO ARBITRATION. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPH 5 OF AND EXHIBIT C TO DECLARATION OF PAUL W. CANE, JR. RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DETERMINE ARBITRABILITY; PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 3 THRU 9, OF DECLARATION OF JANE LUKE HILL RE: PLAINTIFF MOTION TO DETERMINE ARBITRABILITY; AND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARAGRAPHS 3, 5 AND 6 OF AND EXHIBIT A TO DECLARATION OF MELINDA REEVES RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DETERMINE ARBITRABILITY, ARE GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S ORAL REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE RE: ATTORNEY/CLIENT PRIVILEGE AND SUBMISSION OF ADDITIONAL DECLARATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Joinder Of Pltf Thomas J. Murray In Pltf Kathleen A. Mclorgs' Motion To Determine Arbitrability (On Remand From The California Court Of Appeal) In Kathleen A. Mclorg V. United Services Automobile Association, San Francisco Superior Court #458338
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF THOMAS MURRAY Joinder of Kathleen A. McLorgs' Motion to Determine Arbitrability (On Remand From The California Court Of Appeal) In Kathleen A. Mclorg V. United Services Automobile Association, San Francisco Superior Court #458338. Appearances: John A. McGuinn, Esq. of McGuinn, Hillsman & Palefsky, appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party; Paul W. Cane, Jr. Esq. of Paul Hastings (415) 856-7085, appearing for Defendant United Services Auto Ass'n, and opposing party. Hearing held, argued, and the Court rules as follows: severance denied. This matter is not subject to arbitration. Plaintiff's motion to strike paragraph 5 of and Exhibit C to Declaration of Paul W. Cane, Jr. re: plaintiff's motion to determine arbitrability; Plaintiff's motion to strike paragraphs 3 thru 9, of declaration of Jane Luke Hill re: plaintiff motion to determine arbitrability; and Plaintiff's motion to strike paragraphs 3, 5 and 6 of and exhibit A to declaration of Melinda Reeves re: plaintiff's Motion to determine arbitrability, are granted. Defendant's Oral request for continuance re: attorney/client privilege and submission of additional declaration is denied. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare Order. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
